characters.name: Characters
characters.description: Main and recurring characters and their respective affiliations.

characters.name: Nearl Crews
characters.description: Nearlis a mentally disabled homeless man whose eyes Killface and Xander Crews tried to steal. He is later used as a substitute for Xander Crews by the Xtacles, who learn that he is in fact the long lost twin brother of Xander Crews, forced to live in a mental hospital by his parents, who preferred to think of him as dead. Nearl is then left on the street after the hospital becomes defunct. After having his mental disability treated with "brain chemical", he swears revenge against Xander by threatening to kill him, but is soon shot in the back of the head by Ronnie the Xtacle to prevent the series from becoming any more complicated. The corpse is then found by the three nerds of the previous episode, the last two attempt to reanimate it. Like Xander, Nearl is voiced by Adam Reed. When the Xtacles give him a shave and a haircut, he actually looks quite sophisticated, and bears more than a passing resemblance to Xander himself.
